title: GPM interactive demo
sample: Global Natural Earth modern baseline build (M22)
note: PMTiles-first global demo over the full Natural Earth admin-1 build (4603 provinces) with the M21 area/region/superregion hierarchy. The public channel is Modern-only. Historical geometry and politics remain internal research fixtures until an exact start date passes worldwide research and runtime certification.

pmtiles.note: Primary polygon source; the inspector reads rendered vector features.

live_layers.label: Owner choropleth
live_layers.desc: Scenario owner colors from atlas export (PMTiles vector source)

live_layers.label: Culture paint
live_layers.desc: M18 curated culture hints with deterministic colors

live_layers.label: Religion paint
live_layers.desc: M18 curated religion hints with deterministic colors

live_layers.label: Area / region / superregion hierarchy
live_layers.desc: M21 nested hierarchy borders and paint over 659 areas, 169 regions, 8 superregions

live_layers.label: Adjacency graph
live_layers.desc: Precomputed land/strait centroid lines from the global adjacency CSV

live_layers.label: Province inspector
live_layers.desc: Owner, controller, cores, claims, culture, religion, hierarchy fields

live_layers.label: Curation diffs & golden borders
live_layers.desc: M17: gpm curation diff/checklist, external bundles, expanded golden-border suites

live_layers.label: PMTiles / vector tiles
live_layers.desc: M19/M22: per-scenario global ownership PMTiles are the primary polygon source

future_slots.label: Certified start-date reconstructions
future_slots.desc: Worldwide research and runtime certification for 1444, 1836, 1914, and 1936 over the M23 neutral location fabric
